meaning: Street<英>卡纳比街(伦敦的一条街道,以时装出名);(年轻人的)时装
examples: Along with her husband, Quant opened up a small shop, Bazaar, on Carnaby Street of London.
When I was 13, I went to Carnaby Street in London and got my ear pierced and dyed my hair orange.
Whether you've spent your morning at the National Gallery or Wallace Collection, it's an easy walk, Tube or bus ride to the Carnaby area, near Oxford Circus, for lunch.
Two sites favoured by the council on Moor Lane, Carnaby and Eppleworth Road, Cottingham, had already been suggested in a previous proposal.
As part of the planned consultation, surveyors have suggested a further site on land south of Woldgate, Bridlington as a possible alternative to the site at Carnaby.
